title: Create Tardis
description: Simple modpack made around Refined TARDIS and create mod made for me and my friends but i figure why not let others play it and this makes it easyer to share with them.
body:
Create TARDIS – A Tech & Exploration Modpack for Me and My Friends

Create TARDIS is a custom-built adventure and engineering modpack centered around the creativity of Create, the dimensional exploration of TARDIS Refined, and a curated collection of quality-of-life, tech, and world-building mods. Designed for me and my friends, this pack blends automation, exploration, flight, and progression into one smooth experience.

Build massive factories powered by Create’s rotating machinery. Automate resources with Slice & Dice, Sifter, Mechanical Spawners, Diesel Generators, and more. Expand your tech network with Applied Energistics 2 and Create Applied Kinetics. Then step into the TARDIS and explore stunning custom terrain from Terralith and immersive worlds full of  unique artifacts, and new biomes.

Whether you want to engineer, explore, fly aircraft, travel with a backpack, discover powerful rings, or just chill with QoL improvements like AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks, and JEI—this modpack brings it all together.

Key Features:

Create-focused automation: Copycats+, New Age, Renewable Brass, Create Armory, Jetpacks, Nuclear, Diesel Generators, and more.

Dimensional travel with TARDIS Refined – build, pilot, and upgrade your own TARDIS.

High-tech systems with Applied Energistics 2 and Mining/Charging Gadgets.

Stunning world generation via Terralith + TerraBlender.

Exploration & adventure with Artifacts, Traveler’s Backpack, and Immersive Aircraft.

Quality-of-life essentials: JEI, Mouse Tweaks, Lootr, GuideME, AppleSkin.

Lightweight utility mods like Curios API, Architectury, Kotlin, Botarium, and more.

Perfect for small groups, modded survival enjoyers, Create fans, and anyone who wants a mix of technology, exploration, and style.
